query: SELECT id, document_id, status, stage, progress_percent, started_at, updated_at, NOW() as current_time, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, updated_at, NOW()) as minutes_since_update FROM processing_jobs WHERE status = 'processing' ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 5;
